name: Data Axle / Infogroup
title_tag: Manage Your Business Information on DataAxle with Synup
detailed_paragraph:
Data Axle / Infogroup + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on Data Axle / Infogroup with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is Data Axle / Infogroup?

Data Axle, formerly known as Infogroup, is a data and marketing services company that specializes in providing businesses with accurate and comprehensive business and consumer data. They offer a range of solutions to help businesses with marketing, sales, and customer engagement.

Why Data Axle / Infogroup + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on Data Axle / Infogroup, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to Data Axle / Infogroup through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on Data Axle / Infogroup.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on Data Axle / Infogroup, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate Data Axle / Infogroup + Synup?

The Data Axle / Infogroup integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the Data Axle / Infogroup integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the Data Axle / Infogroup logo to manage the Synup + Data Axle / Infogroup integration and associated settings.

seo.description: Supercharge your business data on Data Axle Infogroup. Synup integration ensures accurate information for unparalleled online visibility.
